feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Disable the 'Delivery Unit' option in HANA ALM
entry.content:
Our developer is moving transport from one system to another using delivery unit tab which leads to misconfiguration passing to target system. We are trying to revoke those access but we have seen that they are still able to do use delivery unit tab. We want to disable or grayed out delivery unit tab from alm home page. please help us how to restrict this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inventory valuation by serial number or lot number
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have a question about Inventory valuation.

Is it possible to evaluate stocks by serial or lot number?

If it is possible, please let me know how to do it and if there is anything I should be aware of.

Regards,

entry.title: Reset deletion flag (lvorm) at mvke level in IS retail system
entry.content:
We are using SAP IS Retail system in S4 HANA and deletion flag is set at Sales level (mvke table) for a material.

How to remove the deletion flag ?

entry.title: Update Storage Location
entry.content:
Greetings,

What issues or problems require updating the storage location?

thank you

entry.title: Update Storage Location
entry.content:
Greetings

What issues or problems require updating the storage location?

entry.title: Update Min and Max
entry.content:
Hi All,

What issues or problems require updating the Min Max?

Thank you

entry.title: BTP HANA temporarily unavailable
entry.content: From the past two days, in my SAP BTP trial account, I am unable to access my HANA cloud services. The error that pops up says "A fatal error has occurred and the application is temporarily unavailable. SAP is investigating the problem."

entry.title: How to delete failed archiving files of the MM_ACCTIT object? (SARA tcode)
entry.content:
Hello dears,

We are having a slowdown in the archive selection operation at the time of deletion because there are several unsuccessful write files in the system.
We do not need to physically delete records from the system, but we would just like to delete these unsuccessful archive files (which are inconsistent since the records were deleted by other write and delete operations).

Does anyone know how to do this?

Thanks in advance.

Silvia

entry.title: Can you help me how to fetch opening balance with bincode wise for sap business one query
Table Partition for S063
entry.content:
According to our PERSON_NAME, we have a table S063 that should be partitioned.
This has to be done in both our R3D, R3Q and R3P systems.
Largest Non-partitioned Column Tables (Records)

The number of records in column-based table partitions may become critical.

The table below shows the largest non-partitioned column tables in terms of the number of records.
Largest Non-partitioned Column Tables According To Records
Schema Name
Table Name
Records (Total)
Rating
2 Billion Records App
SAPABAP1
S063
IP_ADDRESS


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: HANA Memory usage alert when it is reaches 80% of capacity SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any possibility to set up SAP B1 HANA memory usage alert with email trigger once the utilized HANA memory usage reaches 80%?

Such that sudden outage of SAP SAP B1 HANA Services can be avoided as a precaution.

 

Best regards

Anand

SAP HANA SAP HANA, platform edition  SAP HANA studio SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Down payment clearing
entry.content: Please suggest what will be the solution for automatic vendor line item clearing along with down payment through transaction code MIRO.

entry.title: OBY6 Forex rate settings
entry.content:
Hi All,

I had a question about configuration of company in OBY6 regarding the option of "No exch. Rate diff. when clearing in LC". How does this work exactly?

Hypothetical example of document in foreign currency being cleared in LC:

Company A in India imports goods worth 1,000 USD when exchange rate is 1 USD=80 INR. AP would be posted at INR 80,000.

At the time of payment if the rate changes to 1 USD = 85 INR, 85,000 INR would be required to clear the invoice, leading to an exchange loss of 5,000 INR. 

If the above option in OBY6 is enabled, will this exchange loss not be posted? If so, why would this be required as it is against GAAP requirements.

Thank you!

entry.title: TLS/SSL configuration on both the server and the client.
entry.content:
We have the below requirement on the SSL/TLS and client and database traffic encryption in HANA as described below.

1. To use protocol to secure communication between the SAP PERSON_NAME database and clients tat access the SQL interface of the database, TLS/SSL must be configured on both the server and the client.

2. client and database traffic encryption.

Can you please guide us how to enable client and database traffic encryption. and TLS/SSL configuration in  both the server and the client.
Please share us in case any relevant documents are available 

Thanks and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: International Version Address
entry.content:
Please help to clarify below:

I maintain an international language for a plant code (OX10) - let's consider plant 0001 with English (EN) and Chinese (CN) address versions. This results in my plant appearing twice in the MB51 filter, once for each language. How can I address this issue and ensure that only one line is displayed in MB51, given that the data for both filters is identical?

Beside, what will be the impact if I have the CN address removed?

entry.title: Adobe form does not display decimals ,00
entry.content:
Hi,

Struggling with decimal comma issue.

I am adding together the first 2 values below – resulting in the last value, but it is dropping a zero:

I then format this field:

But it then rounds up the value and drops all decimals:

Please note that I am working in a 2 tier SAP S4 HANA public edition i.e. no development tier.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Hana Cloud Certification soon dissapear, why?
entry.content:
Hello, recently i saw that HANA CLOUD certifications will dissappear soon in March, any idea why?
How it will be in the future? 

Thank you,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: listing for BOM component items
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Need of your help for BOM listing components.

BOM header material listing is checked by the SAP standard function, we need the exit program that will check all BOM components material listing. We have to activate listing for BOM components. what is the Exit program for it?

And also, our requirement is that If any material is not listed then the program will return the error message and fail the sales order entry. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Execution Reverse a sales document related to a SO not migrated
entry.content:
Hello all,

When trying to reverse a migrated document through FBR2, i'm getting an error which says :  Order XXXX cannot carry revenues. i've tried so many orders to see but still getting the same error.

Could you please tell what should i do or if there's any other way to reverse the document?

 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP HANA Database Revision upgrade in HANA SYSTEM Replication Architecture - Standard Approach
entry.content:
Could you please suggest on the Below Process.

1. can we perform SAP HANA Database Update from version 2.00.055.00.1615413201 to 2.00.059.11.1700553860 on  Node2 - HA (Secondary) and Node3 - DR (Secondary) prior to doing on Node1 - Primary ?
2. will the SAP Hana System Replication works if the SAP database Revision versions are different 
    I mean Secondary's are version 2.00.055.00.1615413201 and Primary is higher rev version 2.00.059.11.1700553860
    
Please confirm the Best Standard Approach that can be followed when doing SAP HANA Database Revision upgrade in HANA SYSTEM Replication Architecture    


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
